name_en: 🆕 Chip version.💕 Top-tier replica M12205 This accessory bag features a zipper closure and comes with a gold chain, which can be attached to most Louis Vuitton handbag D-rings. The unique screen-printed design is lively and cute, and it is a limited edition.
